meta.last_infra_change: 2026-04-22: atomic state write / orphan order cancel / API retry / CONTROL rollout_mode=LIVE / ai_auto_train_enabled=1 / ai_train_shadow_boost=0.20 / no_paper_hours=14,15,16 / ai_train_weekly_bad_hours=14,15,16 / daily_loss_limit_pct=-2.0 / 2026-04-26: note CMS central orchestration skill/agents/tools added; local-only wrappers and context export / 2026-04-29: MR observe runner A-rank PAPER promotion enabled safely in MR-only instance / 2026-05-06: VM IB Gateway mode added to daily_ops_check, ibkr_gateway_watch, and unified dashboard using VM-local 127.0.0.1:7497 as effective API endpoint / 2026-05-07: VM Tailscale added for iPhone dashboard access at 100.66.216.5:8793 / 2026-05-07: VM KEIBA Streamlit and status API added on Tailscale ports 8511 and 8789
meta.purpose: Cross-chat operational handover for Ouroboros bot stack
meta.source: repository snapshot + confirmed operator logs in this thread

paths.note: VM path can differ; always confirm with `pwd` before running systemd-related commands.

morning_start_check.window: 20 minutes before start_hour to 5 minutes after
sample_recovery: previous-day daily_loss_breach disable can be re-enabled in the morning when drift=INSUFFICIENT and trade_paused_by_drift=false
light sample shortage can also re-enable in the morning when remaining_samples<=4 and risk_tightened_by_drift=false
deep sample shortage can re-enable in the morning when remaining_samples<=6 with temporary tighter risk controls
manual hard stop should use observe_only=1 or safety_hard_block=1

ibkr_gateway_monitor.mode: VM IB Gateway Paper local monitor
ibkr_gateway_monitor.read_only_smoke: ssh ubuntu@161.33.26.35 'cd /home/ubuntu/trading_bot/MAIN && python3 test_ibkr_connection.py --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7497 --client-id 11 --stocks AAPL,MSFT,NVDA,TSLA,QQQ,SPY --fx USDJPY'

tailscale.note: Mac-side Tailscale may be disconnected; iPhone must have Tailscale ON to open the VM URL.

vm_dashboard_ops.external_access_note: service listens on VM 0.0.0.0:8793. Public http://161.33.26.35:8793 may still time out via OCI ingress, but Tailnet access is available at http://100.66.216.5:8793/tools/unified_dashboard.html

operational_notes: shadow activity is written to logs/instances/shadow rather than main logs/trade_log_*.csv
widget shadow_runner_alive is based on .run_lock_shadow pid liveness
state_shadow.json is sparser than main state.json, so use service + runner log + shadow logs for verification
when bot.py or run.py changes, restart ouroboros-shadow.service as well as ouroboros-bot.service because shadow is a long-running process
shadow uses exit_technical_enabled=1 to test earlier paper-only reversal exits before promoting any change to main
shadow also uses trend_strength_filter_enabled=1 with lookback_n=20 and min_er=0.28 to skip weak/choppy entries as OBSERVE_TREND_STRENGTH_WEAK before promoting any trend-strength filter to main
shadow also uses weak_progress_exit_enabled=1 with min_hold=30 and max_best_fav=0.05 to close flat timeout candidates earlier without changing main

shadow also uses progress_reversal_exit_enabled=1 with min_hold=20, min_best_fav=0.08, and max_current_fav=0.03 to exit progressed-then-faded paper trades before they degrade into later technical timeouts
shadow also uses no_follow_through_exit_enabled=1 with min_hold=5, max_best_fav=0.01, and max_current_fav=0.00 to exit HTF-aligned but zero-follow-through paper trades before they hit SL

shadow also uses htf15_context_enabled=1, htf60_context_enabled=1, htf_context_lookback_n=8, htf_bias_slope_pct=0.02, and ai_use_htf_context=1 so 15m bias-trendline-channel plus 60m bias-only context can be observed before any main rollout
shadow also uses htf60_countertrend_penalty=0.20 and htf15_60_conflict_penalty=0.25 so entries that look good on 15m but fight the 60m bias are penalized more heavily
OBSERVE_AI_BLOCK notes now include htf60_countertrend=1 and htf15_60_conflict=1, and daily review/widget expose those block counts as HTF60逆風 and 15/60ねじれ
daily reflection now also emits shadow_htf_hint/reason so filter / htf / exit can be reviewed separately in notifications and widgets

daily reflection can optionally use OpenAI Responses API by setting trade_notify_daily_reflection_llm_provider=openai or trade_notify_daily_reflection_llm_mode=openai; API keys must come from env such as OPENAI_API_KEY, not secrets.toml plaintext
daily reflection auto mode with provider=openai falls back to Ollama and then deterministic fallback if cloud generation fails, so notifier delivery should not be blocked by cloud LLM errors
the 2026-04-08 shadow SL sample was not a flat timeout miss; it reached best_fav=0.119989% once and then reversed into PAPER_EXIT_SL, so treat it as reversal-wrap rather than profit-miss

widget and daily report now expose shadow exit_tech plus trend_weak, weak_progress, progress_reversal, progress_timeout, no_follow_through, and pure timeout counts so timeout reduction can be compared against the new guard

shadow metrics should be read as weak=flat trades closed by WEAK_PROGRESS, pr=progressed trades closed by PROGRESS_REVERSAL after giving back to current_fav<=0.03%, pto=trades that reached best_fav>=0.08% before timing out technically, nf=zero-follow-through trades closed by NO_FOLLOW_THROUGH, and timeout=pure TIMEOUT that was neither weak_progress nor progress_timeout nor progress_reversal nor no_follow_through

daily reflection LLM prompt/fallback now receives shadow_filter_hint/reason plus shadow_exit_hint/reason so the next-day recommendation can mention maintain/loosen/tighten for trend-strength and maintain/earlier/observe for WEAK_PROGRESS exits

widget and daily-reflection page now also read latest reflection shadow_filter_hint/shadow_exit_hint so large widget and reflection detail can show shadow adjustment guidance without waiting for the notification text
daily reflection also carries loss_pattern_breakdown so 反転巻き込み / 伸び不足 / entry遅れ can be surfaced in review text and the LLM prompt
daily reflection also carries opportunity_pattern_breakdown so entry約定失敗 / exit取り逃し / 時間帯回避 / 時間ブロック / spread回避 can be surfaced in review text and the LLM prompt
weekly auto feedback now also compares main vs shadow and stores shadow_weekly_review with 昇格候補 / 保留 / 差し戻し / 評価保留 in state.json
weekly auto feedback can optionally use OpenAI Responses API with --llm-mode openai --openai-model gpt-5.4-mini; default auto mode still prefers local Ollama for stability on the current VM
weekly auto feedback also compares main vs shadow loss/opportunity patterns and stores pattern_hint/pattern_reason such as entry品質不足 / 執行品質不足 / 逃がし不足 / 伸び不足 / 昇格阻害小
widget/Web weekly card now reads _weekly_auto_feedback.shadow_weekly_review and shows a short weekly hint such as 保留 / entry品質不足
weekly shadow compare defaults to ../logs/instances/shadow and can be overridden with --shadow-logs-dir
2026-04-04 VM dry-run confirmed weekly shadow compare for 20260323-20260329 with decision=評価保留 because main_closed=6 while shadow_closed=140

notes: MR observe runner is paper-only and remains LIVE-disabled
It emits OBSERVE_MR / OBSERVE_MR_FILTER_NG / OBSERVE_MR_TRIGGER, and promotes only A-rank trigger/reclaim setups to PAPER when mr_paper_enabled=1
Use it to collect PAPER outcome samples without affecting main/shadow live logic
Primary review points are mr_rank distribution, mr_level_type, mr_reclaim, mr_stop_pct, mr_htf15_bias, mr_htf15_trendline, mr_htf15_channel_pos, and mr_htf60_bias
Use tools/mr_observe_summary.py for a quick per-day summary

quality_gate.ai_score_rule: Only cp_quality=OK can affect chart_pattern_comp; THIN remains log-only.

daily_review: notification line: 局面=... / 転換=... / B回避=N
market_phase_layer.safety: B phase hard-block is opt-in via market_phase_block_b_enabled=1; OHLC fallback only fills UNKNOWN context and remains a light AI context.

aiba_style_layer.scope: Phase 1: kuchibashi/rev-kuchibashi, PPP/rev-PPP, nine-rule alert, try-fail observation. Hanshin candle shape remains future Phase 2.
aiba_style_layer.safety: Logging is enabled by default. AI score impact requires explicit aiba_style_ai_enabled=1.

trade_system_review.scope: local-only review of main/shadow logs, read-only VM snapshot logs, feature outcomes, feature presence, effective config, missing inputs, and hypotheses

notes: BUY-side fast-MA-near filter added on 2026-03-29 and tightened to 0.12 on 2026-04-03
Fresh trend flip entries are blocked for 10 minutes
CANARY take-profit is scaled down for quicker sample collection
Live exits use marketable limit prices to avoid TP/SL exit_unfilled
New entries are blocked when a lunch/news block is imminent
Open positions flatten with PAPER_EXIT_PRENEWS before lunch/news windows
Mean reversion observe-only layer stays dormant unless observe_only=1 and mr_observe_enabled=1
Higher-timeframe context is enabled only on shadow and MR observe by default, using 15m bias-trendline-channel and 60m bias-only roles
5m OHLC chart-pattern recognition is implemented with a tick-density quality gate; cp_quality=THIN is record-only and cannot boost/veto AI score
shadow and mr_observe systemd templates run at 60 seconds while main stays at 300 seconds to improve observe sample density without increasing main load
A/B/C market phase recognition is implemented; phase=B hard entry blocking is opt-in so main behavior is not abruptly changed
Market phase transitions are stored in state._market_phase and can be notified via trade_notify_market_phase_enabled=1
shadow uses near_tp_giveback_exit_enabled=1 to test exit_tech=NEAR_TP_GIVEBACK for TP-near-miss giveback cases before touching main
Aiba-style Phase 1 labels are logged by default; aiba_style_ai_enabled remains opt-in before affecting AI score
trade_system_review.py can produce local-only JSON/MD review before changing settings
trade_system_review.py --snapshot-dir .local_llm/vm_snapshot/latest can review read-only VM snapshots without VM writes
Market phase now falls back from NO_CLEAR_PHASE to OHLC swing/close soft classification so AI gate has fewer UNKNOWN contexts without hard-blocking entries.

daily_reflection_snapshot_fallback.safety: read-only snapshot fallback; no VM writes, no CONTROL writes by itself

effective_config_dump.safety: read-only config dump; no CONTROL writes, no VM service restarts, no external API

shadow_promotion_feature_review.decision_impact: none until enough samples are reviewed

mfe_mae_review.safety: review/logging only; entry and exit decisions are unchanged by the reporting fields

marketing_department.source_article: 【有料級】Claude Codeで1人マーケ部門を作った全記録
marketing_department.principle: shared context + skill layers + CSV data layer; note posting remains manual

note_cms_central.safety: local-only orchestration; note posting remains manual; no VM deploy and no paid dependency required

systemd_rules.why_values_revert: installer rerenders /etc/systemd/system units from templates; direct edits under /etc or temporary VM-only sed changes are overwritten on reinstall

known_incidents.root_cause: service used new flags but tools/weekly_auto_feedback.py remained old
known_incidents.fix: copy new script into tools/, py_compile, daemon-reload, restart service

known_incidents.root_cause: memory pressure with larger models on small VM
fix: add 2GB swap
set OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH=512
set OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE=30s
use qwen2.5:0.5b
increase timeout to 180 sec

known_incidents.root_cause: service flags updated before script version
known_incidents.fix: sync tools/market_drift_watch.py then reinstall systemd units

known_incidents.symptom: daily close report could be missed on always-on runner days
known_incidents.root_cause: runner_alive stayed true so runner_off alone did not represent trading-session end
fix: send on SKIP_OUT_OF_TIME
backfill once on day_rollover if previous day was unsent
store daily reflection json
enable safe auto-apply for ai_train_weekly_bad_hours and no_paper_hours only

known_incidents.symptom: trade_enabled stayed OFF after previous-day daily loss auto-disable while drift stayed INSUFFICIENT
known_incidents.root_cause: morning guard required drift=NORMAL and did not distinguish sample collection from drift-forced pause
fix: persist auto-disable reason in trade_event_cursor
allow morning sample_collection re-enable when disable reason is previous-day daily_loss_breach
keep block when trade_paused_by_drift=true or safety/risk/streak gates are active
also allow low-sample recovery when remaining_samples<=4
allow deep recovery when remaining_samples<=6 by temporarily tightening daily_loss_limit_pct and streak_stop_*
persist risk restore baselines in state._drift_watch so drift watch can restore later

known_incidents.symptom: SELL position survived into lunch/news window, then reversed and finished as SL
known_incidents.root_cause: entry guard only blocked active news windows and open positions were not proactively flattened before lunch/news
fix: block new entries when a lunch/news block is within news_entry_block_ahead_min
close existing positions with PAPER_EXIT_PRENEWS within pre_news_exit_buffer_min
respect pre_news_exit_min_hold_min to avoid immediate churn after entry

known_incidents.symptom: 2026-04-02 15:26 BUY passed with fast_ma_dist=0.1189% and reversed into SL
known_incidents.root_cause: buy_fast_ma_distance_pct=0.10 allowed a near-fast-MA BUY that was still too early
fix: raise buy_fast_ma_distance_pct from 0.10 to 0.12
keep SELL threshold unchanged at 0.10

known_incidents.symptom: 0.5b summaries were often too terse despite stable fallback behavior
known_incidents.root_cause: default model prioritized minimal footprint over low-frequency summary quality
fix: promote qwen2.5:1.5b only for daily reflection
keep weekly feedback on qwen2.5:0.5b because 1.5b times out on the current VM
tighten both prompts with explicit numeric decision hints for small-model stability
use 240 sec for daily reflection and 180 sec for weekly feedback

known_incidents.symptom: day_rollover daily report retried when notify target was disabled, and a 16:39 BUY entered just before forced EOD close
known_incidents.root_cause: daily report tracked only effective delivery, and bot allowed new entries after EOD cutoff while still inside end_hour
fix: add daily_goal_report_handled_day8 to stop duplicate day_rollover processing when no target is configured
block new entries during the EOD window with OBSERVE_TIME_BLOCK and eod_entry_window note
live_confirmation: trade_event_cursor.json keeps daily_goal_report_sent_day8 empty when notify target is disabled
ouroboros-trade-notifier.service completed with sent=0 and no repeated 20260403 day_rollover report after the handled cursor was set

known_incidents.symptom: shadow service was active but recent activity was easy to miss because main widget/report surfaces only main logs by default
known_incidents.root_cause: shadow uses separate logs/instances/shadow and separate control/state files
fix: confirm ouroboros-shadow.service active and run_shadow.log ticks continue
confirm shadow samples are already absorbed by ai_train_include_shadow=1 and ai_train_shadow_boost=0.70
add shadow_day to widget payload and daily goal report detail

known_incidents.symptom: shadow kept entering after EOD cutoff at 16:06 / 16:21 / 16:31 even though bot.py had eod_entry_window blocking logic
known_incidents.root_cause: ouroboros-shadow.service had been running since 2026-03-11 and had not reloaded the updated bot.py process image
fix: restart ouroboros-shadow.service after bot.py / run.py changes
confirmed shadow restart at 2026-04-04 16:36 JST
confirmed live OBSERVE_TIME_BLOCK eod_entry_window logs at 16:41 / 16:46 / 16:51 / 16:56 / 17:01 / 17:06 JST after restart

known_incidents.symptom: shadow 2026-04-04 closed trades were heavily timeout-driven (TIMEOUT 5 / EOD 4 / SL 1 / TP 1)
known_incidents.root_cause: paper positions included both no-follow-through trades and trades that briefly moved in favor but reverted before TP, while timeout handling remained IGNORE
fix: enable exit_technical_enabled=1 in CONTROL_shadow.csv
keep change shadow-only first to validate earlier reversal exits before touching main
surface shadow exit_tech counts in widget and daily goal report
highlight shadow tech-exit growth in the daily summary when exit_technical_n increases versus the previous day

last_observed_state.note: This is based on latest operator logs in this thread, not guaranteed to be current now.

Run timer + journal checks for drift/weekly/notifier/widget
Run state/control key checks and compare to expected gate values
If the task touches note CMS orchestration, read MAIN/.claude/skills/note-cms-orchestrator/SKILL.md.
Export latest note CMS context with: python3 MAIN/tools/note_cms_central_skill.py --stdout
priority_backlog: Add notifier event for automatic resume gate completion
Add schema-like state key validator for drift/weekly objects
Add daily PnL summary to widget payload when logs dir is available
Run MR in a dedicated observe-only instance and review OBSERVE_MR* note quality plus rank distribution before any PAPER promotion
Classify recent shadow SL samples into reversal-wrap vs profit-miss and promote only the fixes that survive shadow
After at least 3 trading days, decide whether phase/aiba/near_tp REPORT_ONLY rows should become hard shadow promotion gates
After enough max_adv samples accumulate, split reports into real MAE and legacy mae_proxy cohorts
